name: Raisin Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 3/4 cups Milk or more (not low or nonfat)
2/3 cup Medium- or short-grain white rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, rice, sugar, butter, cinnamon stick, and salt in a heavy large saucepan.
2. Simmer over medium-low heat until rice is tender and mixture is creamy, stirring frequently for about 1 hour.
3. Remove from heat and discard the cinnamon stick.
4. Stir in raisins and vanilla extract.
5. In a separate small saucepan, bring 3/4 cup milk to a simmer.
6. Whisk egg yolks in a medium bowl until smooth.
7. Gradually whisk hot milk into beaten yolks.
8. Return mixture to the saucepan with rice mixture.
9. Stir over medium heat until a thermometer registers 160 degrees, about 2 minutes (do not boil).
10. Mix egg and rice mixtures together.
11. Transfer pudding to a large nonmetal bowl. Cover and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.
12. Thin with more milk if desired, then spoon into bowls and serve.
